description: Unique identifier for each loan application
business_meaning: Primary key linking events to cases
use_in_model_or_analysis: Joining events to case-level features; deduplication.

description: Name of the activity performed
business_meaning: Identifies which step of the workflow occurred
use_in_model_or_analysis: Mapped to stages via activity_to_stage_mapping.csv; defines Stage-1 inclusion.

description: Datetime the activity was completed
business_meaning: Anchors all duration and SLA computations
use_in_model_or_analysis: Computes processing time, SLA breach flag, month index for ITS.

description: Lifecycle phase of the activity
business_meaning: Distinguishes when a step started vs ended
use_in_model_or_analysis: Filtered to 'complete' for duration calculations.

description: Identifier for the human or system processor
business_meaning: Indicates capacity attribution at the event
use_in_model_or_analysis: Constructs resource-workload feature; resource-level audit.

description: Loan amount requested by applicant
use_in_model_or_analysis: Log-transformed feature for RQ1, RQ2; segmentation in EDA.

description: Channel through which the application originated
source: Derived from resource and event sequence
use_in_model_or_analysis: One-hot encoded feature for RQ1 and RQ2.

description: Loan product family
source: Derived from BPIC documentation and amount band
use_in_model_or_analysis: Feature for RQ1 and RQ2; subgroup robustness.

description: Ordinal complexity score (1–5)
business_meaning: Captures handling complexity in a single covariate
use_in_model_or_analysis: Feature for RQ1 turnaround time model.

description: Whether the application reached A_Complete without entering A_Incomplete
use_in_model_or_analysis: Feature for RQ1 and RQ2; key intervention lever.

description: Whether the case experienced an A_Incomplete event during Stage 1
use_in_model_or_analysis: Outcome component for RQ2 risk flag; KPI for RQ1 and RQ3.

description: Number of times the case visited A_Incomplete
use_in_model_or_analysis: Feature for RQ1; descriptive for EDA.

description: Duration from A_Create Application to A_Validating (hours)
use_in_model_or_analysis: Outcome for RQ1; aggregated to KPI for RQ3.

description: Whether stage1_processing_time exceeds the pooled 75th percentile
use_in_model_or_analysis: Outcome component for RQ2 risk flag; KPI for RQ3.

description: Composite outcome: 1 if exception_flag=1 OR any sla_breach in case else 0
use_in_model_or_analysis: Target for RQ2 logistic-regression classifier.

description: Segment derived from amount band and product type
use_in_model_or_analysis: Feature for RQ1 and RQ2; subgroup analysis.

description: Resource-level exception rate over the trailing 7 days
use_in_model_or_analysis: Feature for RQ1; sensitivity in RQ2.

description: Number of active cases assigned to the resource at the case timestamp
use_in_model_or_analysis: Feature for RQ1 and RQ2.

description: Pre- or post-system-change indicator
use_in_model_or_analysis: Used in RQ3 ITS as the change indicator D_t.

description: Sequential month index across the combined panel
business_meaning: Time variable for the ITS regression
use_in_model_or_analysis: Used in RQ3 ITS as the time covariate t.

description: Result of the W_Validate application activity at end of Stage 1
business_meaning: Stage-1 verification disposition; closes the intake stage
use_in_model_or_analysis: Auxiliary outcome for Stage-1 quality monitoring; not used as a feature in RQ2.

description: Discrete band derived from the model's continuous risk score
business_meaning: Operational routing label used by the workflow router
use_in_model_or_analysis: Output variable of the RQ2 classifier; consumed by the deployment scenario.

description: Terminal application disposition observed at end of case
data_type: Categorical (A_Pending, A_Cancelled, A_Denied, O_Accepted, O_Refused, O_Cancelled)
business_meaning: End-state of the loan application; downstream of Stage 1
use_in_model_or_analysis: Documented for completeness; gold-standard label for risk-flag construction.
